title: Nostalgic Garlic Wraps
description: A crispy and garlicky snack with a nostalgic twist, perfect for snacking or as a side dish. This kosher-friendly recipe features mozzarella cheese inside gluten-free wraps.
instructions: In a mixing bowl, combine kosher salt and garlic powder. Mix well.
Spread peanut butter evenly on the bottom of four to five gluten-free wrap sheets.
Evenly sprinkle the kosher-salt mixture over the spread peanut butter.
Add finely chopped jalapeno peppers if using, then cover with the shredded mozzarella cheese.
Sprinkle red pepper flakes over the top and allow all ingredients to meld together for at least 10 minutes before serving.
Heat oven to 375°F (190°C). Place wraps on a baking sheet and bake for 2-4 minutes until cheese is melted and bubbly.
Remove from oven, let cool slightly, then slice into bite-sized pieces if desired.
